name: nfl_team_seasonlogs_catch_rate range year_offset averages the window (executed-result parity)
description: Seed one player on team ZZZ with distinct 2024 (0.60) and 2025 (0.80) catch_rate, then run nfl_team_seasonlogs_catch_rate with year=[2023] + year_offset=[1,2]. The executed value must equal the AVG over the offset-expanded window (0.70), not the SUM (1.40) -- proving the rate reduces with AVG and, critically, that the team correlation uses the real `tm` column (the generic path previously emitted a non-existent `nfl_team` column that errored at execution but passed the SQL-snapshot).
expected_query: select "player"."pid", player.first_name, player.last_name, (SELECT AVG(nfl_team_seasonlogs.catch_rate) FROM nfl_team_seasonlogs WHERE nfl_team_seasonlogs.tm = player.current_nfl_team AND nfl_team_seasonlogs.year IN (2024,2025) AND nfl_team_seasonlogs.stat_key = 'QB_TOTAL') AS "nfl_team_seasonlogs_catch_rate_0", "player"."primary_position" from "player" where player.primary_position IN ('ZZ') group by player.first_name, player.last_name, "player"."pid", "player"."last_name", "player"."first_name", "player"."primary_position" order by "player"."pid" asc limit 500

seed: INSERT INTO player (pid, first_name, last_name, short_name, formatted_name, primary_position, secondary_position, date_of_birth, nfl_draft_year, current_nfl_team) VALUES ('TEST-NTSL-000909', 'Test', 'Ntsl', 'T.Ntsl', 'Test Ntsl', 'ZZ', 'ZZ', '2000-01-01', 2020, 'ZZZ')
INSERT INTO nfl_team_seasonlogs (tm, stat_key, year, catch_rate) VALUES ('ZZZ', 'QB_TOTAL', 2024, 0.60)
INSERT INTO nfl_team_seasonlogs (tm, stat_key, year, catch_rate) VALUES ('ZZZ', 'QB_TOTAL', 2025, 0.80)
result_equivalence.reference_sql: SELECT AVG(catch_rate) AS nfl_team_seasonlogs_catch_rate_0 FROM nfl_team_seasonlogs WHERE tm = 'ZZZ' AND stat_key = 'QB_TOTAL' AND year IN (2024, 2025)
